title: Kirachaniks eggs crafts
description: I added eggs crafts wich is vanilla litlle friendly and hard to craft, the mod also have a spawner craft.
body:
Now with this mod you can crafts eggs. This crafts is not a such vanilla friendly but suitable for those who want to simplify their lives.
